headline: 3 Reasons to Avoid PKG and 1 Stock to Buy Instead
summary: Packaging Corporation of America trades at $232.33 and has moved in lockstep with the market. Its shares have returned 8.6% over the last six months while the S&P 500 has gained 9%.
